summary: Labor by SMR / Execution Package (5 Phases) - All 27 tests passed. Complete backend testing for Time Entry Linkage, Planned Hours Engine, Labor Cost by Execution Package, Variance/Warnings, and Project Profit Integration.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed labor entries for manual entry testing. tech1@begwork.com has hourly_rate=16.19 EUR/h.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Labor by SMR fully tested. Project PRJ-001 now has 5 labor_entries (3 mapped, 2 unmapped). 3 execution packages with planned_hours computed (2 from budget_estimate, 1 from offer_line). tech1 user has hourly_rate=16.19 EUR/h. Variance calculation: actual - budget (negative = under budget).

P1: POST /api/labor-entries creates entr.notes: Creates entry with auto-generated ID. hourly_rate resolved from employee_profiles collection. labor_cost = hours * hourly_rate. If rate unavailable, both are None.

P1: POST /api/labor-entries/sync-from-wo.notes: Clears old synced entries, creates new from work_reports. Uses case-insensitive activity_name matching for execution_package mapping.

P1: GET /api/labor-entries filters by pr.notes: All 3 filter parameters working correctly. Returns sorted by date DESC.

P2: POST /api/execution-packages/recompu.notes: Recomputed 3 packages. Updates planned_hours, used_hours, remaining_hours, progress_percent_by_hours, actual_labor_cost, variance fields.

P2: Planned hours from budget estimate w.notes: Uses default_rate=18 EUR/h. Example: budget=1000 EUR → planned=55.6h. Source tracked as 'budget_estimate'.

P3: GET /api/labor-cost/by-execution-pac.notes: Returns detailed breakdown with planned/used/remaining hours, budget/actual/variance, by_employee and by_date arrays.

P3: Returns planned/used/remaining hours.notes: Example: TEST_Activity_1 - planned=55.6h, used=9.0h, remaining=46.6h, budget=1000 EUR, actual=64.76 EUR

P4: GET /api/labor-warnings/{project_id}.notes: Returns warnings array with type, message. Package summaries include flags array.

P4: Unmapped entries counted and reporte.notes: 2 unmapped entries detected. Warning: '2 от 5 записа за труд нямат връзка към СМР/пакет'

P5: GET /api/project-profit/{id} include.notes: labor_detail has: total_hours=15h, total_cost=161.9 EUR, mapped_hours=9h, mapped_cost=64.76 EUR, unmapped_hours=6h, unmapped_cost=97.14 EUR

P5: Labor budget_total and variance_valu.notes: budget_total=1400 EUR (sum of package labor_budget_total). variance=-1238.1 EUR (under budget)

Backend: labor_cost = None when hourly_r.notes: Verified: entries without hourly_rate have labor_cost=None

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
